title: Exotic Crispy Argentinian Chicken Skewers
description: Spicy and crispy chicken skewers with a zesty lemon flavor, perfect for a crowd, this Argentinian dish is a real showstopper. The combination of roasted spices and herbs creates a deliciously aromatic flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
Increase the oven temperature to broil and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the chicken is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the skewers hot with lemon wedges on the side.
